Engrams
Docs GitHub PyPI

AI context memory that
actually works

What Engrams provides...

Structured Memory

Save architectural decisions, design patterns, task progress, and project notes.

Smart Search

Search by meaning, not just exact words because Engrams understands what you mean.

Team Governance

Set team-wide rules — like "always use PostgreSQL" — that every contributor's LLM respects.

Codebase Bindings

Link decisions to specific files and folders. Relevant context shows up automatically when editing.

Context Budgeting

As your project grows, Engrams retrieves only relevant items so you keep costs down.

Knowledge Dashboard

See all your project knowledge in a visual, browser-based dashboard.

Get started →
mcp.json 
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "engrams": {
      "command": "uvx",
      "args": ["--reinstall", "--from", "engrams-mcp",
               "engrams-mcp", "--mode", "stdio"]
    }
  }
}
Open Source · v1.3.0

Works with your favourite AI tools

Roo CodeClineCursorWindsurfClaude CodeClaude DesktopAny MCP client
